prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild infirmary. Ari Starling, a feminine healer in cream and mint robes, carefully applies a glowing herbal salve to an injured small creature on a wooden table. Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape, holds the creature steady with gentle, focused hands. Soft warm lamplight, cinematic focus on their cooperative healing effort, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild infirmary shot. Ari Ironleaf carefully adjusts the creature's posture to keep it calm, while Ari Starling finishes wrapping a clean bandage around its limb. Both characters exchange a brief, relieved nod of successful cooperation. Consistent lighting and character appearance, no text, no watermark.
